mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.password, u.real_name, u.id_num, u.status, u.updated_by, u.deleted AS is_delete FROM tenant_user u JOIN tenant_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id AND tm.deleted = 0 AND tm.status = 1 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.status = 1 AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: s.id, s.name, s.phone AS username, s.email, s.id_num, CASE sr.role_code WHEN 'CONTACT' THEN 1001 WHEN 'PAYEE' THEN 1003 ELSE 1002 END AS role_id, CASE sr.role_code WHEN 'CONTACT' THEN '联系人' WHEN 'PAYEE' THEN '收款人' ELSE '店员' END AS role_name, s.merchant_id, m.name AS merchant_name, m.code AS merchant_code, s.status, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(s.created_at) AS create_time
FROM biz_merchant_staff s JOIN biz_merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_merchant_staff_role sr ON sr.staff_id = s.id AND sr.deleted = 0
u.id, u.real_name AS name, u.username, u.email, u.id_num, r.id AS role_id, r.name AS role_name, u.status, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(u.created_at) AS create_time
FROM tenant_user u JOIN tenant_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id AND tm.deleted = 0 JOIN auth_role r ON r.code = tm.role_code AND r.role_scope = 'TENANT' AND r.deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_merchant_staff_role WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND deleted = 0 AND role_code = CASE #{roleId} WHEN 1001 THEN 'CONTACT' WHEN 1003 THEN 'PAYEE' ELSE 'CLERK' END

SELECT s.id, s.name AS real_name, s.phone AS username, s.email, s.id_num, s.status FROM biz_merchant_staff s JOIN biz_merchant_staff_role sr ON sr.staff_id = s.id AND sr.deleted = 0 WHERE s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND sr.role_code = 'PAYEE' AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY sr.is_default DESC, s.id LIMIT 1
SELECT WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND tm.status = 2 AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%')) AND r.id = #{roleId}

SELECT u.id, u.real_name, u.username, u.email, u.id_num, u.status
WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND tm.status = 1 AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{blurParam}, '%'))

SELECT s.id, s.name AS real_name, s.phone AS username, s.email, s.id_num, s.merchant_id, s.status, CASE sr.role_code WHEN 'CONTACT' THEN '联系人' WHEN 'PAYEE' THEN '收款人' ELSE '店员' END AS role_name FROM biz_merchant_staff s LEFT JOIN biz_merchant_staff_role sr ON sr.staff_id = s.id AND sr.deleted = 0 WHERE s.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND s.deleted = 0
